Amounts derived from visual verification against the image, which clearly shows £164 19s 6d with no fraction. gpt-5-mini also had 164/19/6. gemini-flash had 163/19/6. My visual reading confirms 164 pounds, 19 shillings, 6 pence, and no fraction.
